findings.claim: HYP-AMOUNT-BANDED-REPLACEMENT is false: a STANDARD DAMAGED return at 12000 cents receives REFUND, and STANDARD DAMAGED returns at or above 50000 cents receive MANUAL_REVIEW rather than REPLACEMENT.
findings.requiredAction: Remove HYP-AMOUNT-BANDED-REPLACEMENT and place the high-value review rule before tier-specific rules.

findings.claim: HYP-AMOUNT-BANDED-REFUND claims tier-independent behavior below 12000 cents, but the trace pack contains no VIP observation below 12000 cents.
findings.requiredAction: Remove the regardless-of-tier claim; retain refund behavior only for the observed STANDARD DAMAGED domain.

findings.claim: Quarantine does not increase for every observed DAMAGED return: high-value MANUAL_REVIEW leaves both sellable and quarantine unchanged.
findings.requiredAction: Keep quarantine effects inside the REFUND and REPLACEMENT rules and specify no inventory change for MANUAL_REVIEW.

findings.claim: The traces do not establish behavior for item conditions other than DAMAGED, customer tiers other than STANDARD and VIP, or the exact 50000-cent boundary for VIP. The REPLACEMENT sellable decrement is also observed only once.
findings.requiredAction: Do not generalize beyond DAMAGED STANDARD/VIP inputs; preserve VIP boundary handling and replacement stock-availability behavior as explicit unknowns.

revisedRules.statement: First, within the observed DAMAGED STANDARD/VIP domain, high-value inputs take precedence over tier handling and produce MANUAL_REVIEW, PENDING_REVIEW, a HIGH_VALUE review-queue effect, and no inventory change. The inclusive 50000-cent threshold is established exactly for STANDARD by the adjacent 49999 and 50000 traces; VIP is directly observed only at 75000 cents.

After the high-value rule, the observed VIP, DAMAGED, 12000-cent input produces REPLACEMENT and REPLACEMENT_ISSUED, creates a one-unit shipment, decreases sellable inventory by one, and increases quarantine by one.
After the high-value rule, observed STANDARD DAMAGED inputs below 50000 cents produce REFUND and REFUNDED, refund the full amount, leave sellable inventory unchanged, and increase quarantine by one.
